ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the survey */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the question */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the question */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., text, numeric) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group the respondent belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the response belongs to */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_type" TEXT /* Type of education (e.g., formal, informal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_groups" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income group */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Name of the income group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income group */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the income group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "science_education" (
  "science_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each science education level */,
  "science_level" TEXT /* Name of the science education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the science education level */,
  "science_type" TEXT /* Type of science education (e.g., biology, chemistry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("science_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_to_science" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure to science level */,
  "exposure_level" TEXT /* Name of the exposure to science level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exposure to science level */,
  "exposure_type" TEXT /* Type of exposure to science (e.g., media, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_demographics" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level of the respondent */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income group of the respondent */,
  "science_id" INTEGER /* ID of the science education level of the respondent */,
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure to science level of the respondent */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_demographics_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_demographics_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_groups ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_demographics_science_id FOREIGN KEY ("science_id") REFERENCES science_education ("science_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_demographics_exposure_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_id") REFERENCES exposure_to_science ("exposure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., sentiment, topic modeling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being tracked */,
  "trend_result" TEXT /* Result of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being correlated */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external factor being correlated */,
  "correlation_result" TEXT /* Result of the correlation analysis */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlations_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of factor (e.g., economic, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_responses" (
  "user_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_analysis" (
  "user_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_analysis_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES response_analysis ("analysis_id")
)
